headline: Murphy, Scanlon Unveil Bill To Shield Health Care Whistleblowers As Private Equity Expands Hospital Ownership— 'Need To Make Sure...'
summary: Murphy and Scanlon unveil a bill to protect healthcare whistleblowers, citing risks from private equity and growing pressure on hospitals.
